name: School Transportation Leasing
owner_or_parent: Likely affiliated with Yellow Bus Group of America Inc. (FMCSA contact email jdoninger@yellowbusgroupofamerica.com); possible relationship with neighboring Illinois Central School Bus (NACSB/North America Central School Bus) given Morris, IL location
districts_or_customers: Not disclosed; intrastate passenger carrier in IL
recent_news: FMCSA MCS-150 filed 02/11/2026 listing 50 power units / 50 drivers; 1 tow-away crash (no injuries) in trailing 24 months
fit_notes: FMCSA contact email points to Yellow Bus Group of America (Dixmoor, IL operator) - likely an affiliated leasing entity rather than an independent contractor. Co-located with NACSB hub in Morris IL adds further ambiguity. Low priority as standalone tuck-in until ownership clarified.

name: Faith 13 Transportation
districts_or_customers: Parsippany-area school routes (Parsippany-Troy Hills SD vendor directory references)
recent_news: No M&A or safety news identified; small LLC operating ~12 years per Buzzfile
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-location NJ operator (~7 employees per D&B); women-owned LLC. Too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in unless bundled with other Morris County contractors; reservation-style/small fleet profile.

name: Wills Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Burlington County NJ school districts; member of NJ School Bus Contractors Association
recent_news: No M&A or sale news located; long-standing single-location contractor
fit_notes: Small family-run Burlington County contractor (~$0.9M-$2M est revenue, ~15 employees); incorporated 1998. Aging principal (Lennox) + single location offers a clean tuck-in candidate for a NJ Summit roll-up, though scale is modest.

name: Marshall Bus Co
owner_or_parent: independent (Marshall family - three sibling LLCs sharing yard: Marshall Bus Com LLC, JJ Marshall Bus Co LLC, JW Marshall Bus Co LLC; Hall Bus Co also on lot)
principals: James L. Marshall (Owner, Marshall Bus Co); John W. Marshall Sr./Jr. (JW Marshall Bus); patriarch Joseph J. Marshall died Dec 2023
recent_news: Founder Joseph J. Marshall passed away December 15, 2023 after 60+ years driving/operating; business continues under sons James and John
fit_notes: Classic multi-generational MD school bus family; founder's recent (2023) passing is a textbook succession trigger. Three affiliated Marshall LLCs share the 27 Firetower Rd yard and could be acquired as a bolt-on package serving Cecil County. High Summit fit.

name: H & H Truck & Bus Co
service_types: unknown - name suggests truck/bus repair/sales rather than student transport
districts_or_customers: Not identified; no DPSCD contractor listing found
recent_news: No corroborating web presence as a Detroit-area school bus operator
fit_notes: Cannot confirm as an active student-transportation contractor; name (Truck & Bus Co) and Ogden St SW Detroit address are more consistent with a heavy-truck/bus dealer or repair shop than a route operator. Flag for human review before any outreach; likely NOT a tuck-in target.
